race.comment: ZOUFANI (1) is a consistent conveyance who has only missed a drum once in 11 career outings and doesn't know how to put in a poor one. Hard to knock mares in form and should be right there at the business end. FASVARA (3) has won three of four this preparation and is racing high on confidence of late. Has to be included. NEPRAVDA (8) saves her best form for this distance range and will be ready to peak now third run back from the break. In the mix. OUR SMOKESHOW (2) is resuming from a spell. Placed in a recent trial. Opened last campaign with a ninth at Pukekohe over 1400m. First run for the new stable and should be primed for this.
